raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead but WP80 (target lookahead) is slightly right of current heading with delta=-16°, requiring a small right correction at full speed.
knowledge: Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn
Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation
Near WP72-80, track runs nearly due west with very small deltas
Speed 1.5 safe on straight/gentle curve sections
Car is slightly left of center (0.10m) but all wheels on track
Heading near 167° corresponds to west-northwest travel
After WP80, track continues westward then curves south — watch for larger deltas
Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center
When target WP is behind car, use further lookahead WP for bearing calculation
